corrections.location: opening line, first word after β
corrections.note: Verse letter has apostrophe in print.
Printed text reads ἑδωρήματι, not ἑκουσιασμῷ.
Marginal line number 25 intruded into body text.
Second 23 is a marginal line number, not body text.
Latin siglum A is printed, not Greek alpha.
No change; retained as printed. Included no correction?
Latin siglum A in both places.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one substantive misread (ἑδωρήματι) and two marginal line numbers were captured. Apparatus transcription is largely accurate in content, but manuscript sigla A/B are printed as Latin letters throughout and should not be converted to Greek Α/Β.
